name: Sprint 12 — Auth, MCP & BrightSignals
note: Unofficial sprint — no Jira sprint object. Scope derived from GitHub PRs merged June 13–23 + Jira tickets updated in same window.
goals: BrightSignals end-to-end: SSE push delivery + CloudWatch alarms + notifications MVP
Auth hardening: Okta SSO PKCE, Slack service account auth, multi-workspace fixes
MCP connectivity: dedicated ingress, live tools/list, streamable-http parser
dbt agent: account-specific URLs, token probe, scaffold fixes
Audit trail: engineering agent @audit_action decorator (BH-695 epic)

tickets.note: 27 tickets created retroactively (BH-713–739). Most Needs Refinement = merged PR, not yet transitioned.

points.note: Story points not assigned this sprint — fast-paced execution window, tickets created post-merge.

completion.note: Ticket pct understates delivery — majority of work merged then retroactively ticketed. 223 feature PRs shipped.

themes: Auth hardening (Okta SSO, Slack JWT, multi-workspace, OAuth guard)
MCP connectivity card (tools/list, streamable-http, dedicated ingress)
dbt Cloud agent (URLs, token probe, scaffold)
Audit trail epic BH-695 (decorator, emitter, citation chain, tests)
Platform-core reliability (504 fixes, OM webhook, getWorkspaces cap)
